title: Pseudolynosyris platylepis
taxonomy: Pseudolynosyris platylepis is a plant species classified within the family Olacaceae. This family is part of the order Santalales, which consists of parasitic or hemiparasitic plants. The order Santalales is further classified under the clade Asterids, a large group of flowering plants. The clade Asterids is a subset of the larger clade Angiosperms, which includes all flowering plants. Pseudolynosyris platylepis is a unique species with its own distinct classification within the plant kingdom.
